texto: Many of the younger generation know my name in a vague way and connect it with grotesque inventions, but don't believe that I ever existed as a person. They think I am a nonperson, just a name that signifies a tangled web of pipes or wires or strings that suggest machinery. My name to them is like a spiral staircase, veal cutlets, barber's itch—terms that give you an immediate picture of what they mean.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rube Goldberg: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Many of the younger generation know my name in a vague way and connect it with grotesque inventio…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, fame, machines pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de machines e veal.

texto: Uh, I just had an operation last March which was rather serious and I'm recuperating now. I'm on a very bland diet. But, uh, I'm lucky, I was just lucky, that's all.
explicacao: Citação de Rube Goldberg sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Uh, I just had an operation last March which was rather serious and I'm recuperating now. I'm on …” articula reflexao, lucky, now em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como now e serious.
